text: The authoritative source for go.etcd.io/etcd/client/v3 is the etcd-io/etcd repository. The module declaration `module go.etcd.io/etcd/client/v3` is at client/v3/go.mod in the etcd-io/etcd repository. The kubernetes/kubernetes repository vendors this module at vendor/go.etcd.io/etcd/client/v3/ but is not the source of truth — it is a vendored copy. The etcd-io/etcd repo maintains the canonical module with its own go.mod at client/v3/go.mod that declares the module path. Any dependency conflicts, API changes, or version bumps should be tracked against etcd-io/etcd, not the vendored copies in consumer repos.
